name: bing-webmaster-tools-pp-mcp
description: Every Bing Webmaster Tools API method, plus a local SQLite store, offline search, and SEO analytics no other Bing tool has — built agent-native.

bing_webmaster_api_key.title: BING_WEBMASTER_API_KEY
bing_webmaster_api_key.description: Sets BING_WEBMASTER_API_KEY for the Bing Webmaster Tools MCP server. Get a credential from https://www.bing.com/webmasters/.
